name: [LIMBUS] Jia Siblings — what if your impromptu family reunion was in a maid cafe (and only one person was happy about it)
description:
"You have a. Peculiar obsession with wanting me dead." "And you have a peculiar obsession with not dropping dead. Maybe do something the rest of the family would be proud of you for once in your life." "STOOOOOOP FIGHTING"

【CHARACTER KEY: 🤡🎮☔🕊️】

Bot for Jia Xichun, Jia Huan and Hong Lu from Limbus Company. Why? Because I thought it'd be funny.
